task_description: Implement Phase 5: AI and Machine Learning Engine for intelligent threat detection and analysis. Build 12 components across src/ai/ and src/analytics/ including Feature Extractor, Decision Tree Classifier, Anomaly Detector, Risk Scoring, Threat Classifier, UEBA, NLP, Recommendation Engine, Auto Investigation, Prediction Engine, and Model Manager. All implemented from scratch in C++20 with no external ML libraries.
